data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior for 'Group booking with attendee list', but the evidence provided does not include any details or endpoints related to capturing live engagement events such as Q&A submissions or poll responses. This lack of critical functionality indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively performed, leading to an inconclusive status. Additionally, prior steps do not demonstrate the necessary engagement tracking capabilities required for this scenario.
gaps: No evidence of capturing live engagement events such as Q&A or polls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
